name: ESP32-Bit-Pirate
description: A Hardware Hacking Tool with Web-Based CLI That Speaks Every Protocol
readme_summary: ESP32 Bit Pirate is an open-source firmware that transforms an ESP32 device into a versatile hardware hacking tool. It supports a wide array of digital and radio protocols, offering features like sniffing, sending, scripting, and interactive control via a web-based CLI.
key_features: Interactive CLI via USB Serial or WiFi Web
Support for numerous protocols (I2C, SPI, UART, 1-Wire, CAN, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, RFID, etc.)
Protocol sniffers for I2C, UART, SPI, 1Wire, 2wire, CAN, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, SubGhz
EEPROM dump tools
Scripting using Bus Pirate-style commands
Baudrate auto-detection
AT commands support
primary_use_case: Hardware hacking and digital protocol analysis
cover_image_prompt: A master locksmith, holding a multi-tool resembling a Swiss Army knife with numerous glowing digital attachments, is effortlessly opening a series of intricate locks representing different communication protocols (like I2C, SPI, UART, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth). Each lock that opens reveals a stream of organized data or a clear signal. The locksmith is standing in a workshop filled with subtle electronic components and glowing circuit board patterns. Small holographic displays around him show simplified protocol diagrams and data streams. The overall mood is one of empowerment and discovery, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with vibrant, contrasting colors and clear, defined edges.

name: app-store-screenshots
description: end to end app store screenshot creation using AI
readme_summary: This repository provides a Next.js-based editor for generating App Store and Google Play marketing screenshots. It leverages AI coding agents to automate the creation of visually appealing and store-ready screenshot decks, complete with device frames, captions, and connected canvas layouts.
key_features: AI-powered screenshot generation for App Store and Google Play
Connected canvas editor for seamless element spanning
Real device frames for iOS, iPad, Android, and Play Store formats
Inspector controls for editing layout, labels, and transforms
Persistent project state with autosave to disk and localStorage
One-click export bundles at store-ready sizes
Support for locales, RTL-aware copy, and reusable themes
Integration with AI coding agents via `npx skills`
primary_use_case: Automating the creation of professional, marketing-ready App Store and Google Play screenshots using AI.
cover_image_prompt: A digital artist meticulously arranging glowing puzzle pieces that represent app screens onto a large, interconnected canvas. Each puzzle piece seamlessly flows into the next, forming a cohesive visual narrative. In the background, stylized representations of iPhones and Android devices are integrated into the scene, showcasing the final screenshot layouts. Subtle UI elements and data streams float around the artist, hinting at the underlying AI and design tools. The overall mood is creative and efficient, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The style should be a vibrant 3D isometric illustration, emphasizing the interconnectedness and automated nature of the screenshot generation process.

name: agent
description: An open and scalable video surveillance system for anyone making this world a better and more peaceful place.
readme_summary: The Kerberos Agent is an open-source, scalable video surveillance management system designed for IP cameras and other video sources. It allows for the processing and management of video streams, enabling features like motion detection and integration into larger surveillance setups.
key_features: Open-source video surveillance management agent
Scalable and isolated component of the Kerberos.io stack
Supports IP cameras with RTSP H264/H265 streams
Can process streams from USB cameras, Raspberry Pi cameras, etc. (via camera-to-rtsp)
Runs on various hardware architectures (ARM, AMD64) and environments (Raspberry Pi, NUC, VM, Kubernetes)
MIT License, allowing for commercial use
Integrates with the broader Kerberos.io ecosystem
primary_use_case: To provide a flexible and scalable software agent for managing and processing video streams from various camera sources for surveillance purposes.
cover_image_prompt: A vigilant digital watchtower, constructed from glowing Go code blocks and sleek React UI elements, stands guard over a landscape dotted with various IP cameras. From each camera, a stream of data flows like a river towards the watchtower. Inside the watchtower, this data is being analyzed and sorted by robotic arms, with some streams being highlighted as 'motion detected' with a subtle red glow, while others are neatly filed away. The overall mood is one of calm security and advanced technology, rendered in a clean, 3D isometric illustration style with a cool blue and green color palette, emphasizing efficiency and control.

name: MATRIXON-AGENTIC-BROWSER
description: Privacy-first AI browser agent leveraging local small language models (SLMs) for smart web automation
readme_summary: MATRIXON Agentic Browser is an open-source, privacy-focused desktop browser built with Electron. It integrates a fully local AI assistant powered by llama.cpp and GGUF models, enabling smart web automation and interaction without relying on cloud services or API keys.
key_features: Local LLM (GGUF models via llama.cpp)
AgentPanel sidebar AI assistant
Web search, page reading, URL navigation tools
Full-page AI chat with file attachments and LaTeX
AI-summarized web search results
Tab management
Local encrypted password manager
Privacy-first design
Themeable interface
primary_use_case: Smart web automation and AI-assisted browsing using a local, privacy-focused agent.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized robot assistant with a glowing, intelligent eye, sitting comfortably inside a sleek, open laptop. The robot is holding a magnifying glass over a web page displayed on the laptop screen, highlighting information. Streams of subtle, glowing data particles flow from the web page into the robot's eye, representing local processing. In the background, a soft, abstract digital landscape suggests a secure, private environment. The MATRIXON logo is subtly integrated into the laptop's design. The overall mood is helpful and secure, rendered in a clean, 3D isometric illustration style with a bright, inviting color palette.

name: cobalt
description: 🔥 Web dashboard for quick creation and management of game servers.
readme_summary: Cobalt is a self-hosted web dashboard designed for easily creating and managing game servers on your own VPS. It offers a user-friendly interface for server setup, command execution, resource monitoring, and user access control, making it a cost-effective alternative to specialized hosting platforms.
key_features: Easy game server creation and management
Real-time CPU and RAM usage monitoring
User and role management with access control
File manager and editor for configuration files
Web dashboard accessible from any device
primary_use_case: Self-hosting and managing game servers for personal use or small groups.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized dashboard interface, depicted as a futuristic control panel, with glowing buttons and clear readouts. From this panel, digital streams of energy flow outwards, transforming into various game icons (like Minecraft, Terraria) and then into stable, miniature server racks humming with activity. Subtle visual cues like a 'command console' window and resource graphs (CPU, RAM) are integrated into the panel's design. The overall scene is clean, modern, and inviting, with a soft, ambient glow, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with vibrant, game-inspired colors.

name: telegram-anonymous-feedback-bot
description: Telegram бот анонимных сообщений с персональными ссылками, премиум‑функциями и админ‑панелью на Python + Aiogram/pyTelegramBotAPI (python-telegram-bot).
readme_summary: This Python Telegram bot allows users to receive anonymous messages via a unique personal link, with features for replying, blocking senders, and an optional premium system to reveal sender identities. It also includes an admin panel for bot management.
key_features: Personalized anonymous message links
Customizable link text
Anonymous text, photo, and video messages
Direct replies to anonymous messages
Personal sender blocking
Global admin bans
Premium system for sender identification
Admin panel for user and premium management
primary_use_case: Enabling users to receive anonymous feedback or messages through Telegram, with options for managing senders and an optional premium feature to identify them.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, slightly mysterious Telegram message bubble floating in a digital space, with a subtle question mark icon inside. From the bubble, a glowing, ethereal thread extends towards a silhouette of a person, representing the anonymous sender. Another thread, more solid and direct, connects the bubble to a user's profile icon, symbolizing the recipient. Small, subtle UI elements like a 'reply' button and a 'block' icon are visible near the bubble. The overall mood is intriguing yet secure, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with soft, glowing highlights and a balanced color palette of blues, purples, and whites, clearly depicting the flow of anonymous communication and control.
